recent_excerpts: A new malware family named ZionSiphon is designed to sabotage water treatment and desalination plants by manipulating industrial control systems.
A global wave of email-borne worms, driven by a single piece of malware, targeted industrial control systems (ICS) in Q4 2025, marking a significant shift in OT threats.
Kaspersky data shows malware blocked on 33.3% of industrial control system computers in Q4 2025, with internet threats and removable media as top infection vectors.
